title: AdapterContext
description: Output contract for the adapter skill — describes the detected tech stack and test infrastructure context.

framework.description: Frontend framework detected (e.g. React, Vue, Angular)

backendFramework.description: Backend framework detected (e.g. Express, FastAPI, Rails)

componentLibrary.description: UI component library in use (e.g. shadcn/ui, MUI, Ant Design)

packageManager.description: Package manager used in the project

apiClient.description: HTTP/API client used (e.g. axios, fetch, ky)

authPattern.description: Authentication pattern detected (e.g. JWT, session cookie, OAuth)

selectorStrategy.description: Assessment of available selector strategies for Playwright

dataTestIdCoverage.description: Coverage level of data-testid attributes across the codebase

ariaRoleCoverage.description: Coverage level of ARIA role attributes

recommendation.description: Recommended selector strategy for generated tests

existingTestSetup.description: State of existing Playwright test infrastructure

playwrightInstalled.description: Whether Playwright is installed as a dependency

existingSpecCount.description: Number of existing Playwright spec files found

conventions.description: Detected test conventions (e.g. naming patterns, folder structure)

ciPlatform.description: CI/CD platform detected (e.g. GitHub Actions, CircleCI, GitLab CI)

baseUrl.description: Base URL for the application under test

playwrightMcpAvailable.description: Whether Playwright MCP tools are available in the current session

devServerCommand.description: Command to start the dev server (e.g. 'pnpm dev'), or null if not found

devServerUrl.description: URL of the running or expected dev server (e.g. 'http://localhost:5173'), or null
